components.name: Plastic Nose Cone
components.desc: Lightweight cone that cuts through air.

components.name: Aerodynamic Fairing
components.desc: Low-drag composite nose used on orbital rockets.

components.name: Cardboard Airframe
components.desc: Simple tube that holds the rocket together.

components.name: Composite Airframe
components.desc: Strong fiberglass body for bigger rockets.

components.name: Balsa Fin Set
components.desc: Keeps the rocket flying straight.

components.name: Reinforced Fin Set
components.desc: Sturdier fins for high-power flights.

components.name: A8 Solid Motor
components.desc: Small starter motor for first launches.

components.name: D12 Solid Motor
components.desc: Popular motor for classic model rockets.

components.name: F-Class Solid Motor
components.desc: High-power motor for advanced hobby rockets.

components.name: Solid Propellant Grain
components.desc: Pre-packed solid fuel that burns in the motor casing.

components.name: Liquid Booster Engine
components.desc: Main engine that lifts the rocket off the pad.

components.name: Liquid Upper-Stage Engine
components.desc: Restartable engine that finishes the trip to orbit.

components.name: RP-1 Fuel Tank
components.desc: Kerosene-based rocket fuel tank.

components.name: Liquid Oxygen (LOX) Tank
components.desc: Oxidizer that lets fuel burn without air.

components.name: Upper-Stage Fuel Tank
components.desc: Smaller fuel tank for the second stage.

components.name: Upper-Stage Oxidizer Tank
components.desc: Oxidizer tank sized for the upper stage.

components.name: Basic Flight Computer
components.desc: Tracks altitude and triggers recovery.

components.name: Dual-Deploy Flight Computer
components.desc: Advanced computer for two-stage recovery events.

components.name: Basic Inertial Guidance
components.desc: Keeps an orbital rocket pointed the right way.

components.name: GPS-Assisted Guidance
components.desc: Uses satellites to steer very precisely.

components.name: 9V Igniter Battery
components.desc: Powers the flight computer and igniter.

components.name: LiPo Flight Battery
components.desc: Rechargeable battery for advanced avionics.

components.name: Standard Igniter
components.desc: Lights the motor at launch.

components.name: Redundant Dual Igniter
components.desc: Two igniters in case one fails.

components.name: 12-inch Parachute
components.desc: Slows the rocket for a safe landing.

components.name: 24-inch Parachute
components.desc: Bigger canopy for heavier rockets.

components.name: Backup Streamer
components.desc: A ribbon that adds extra drag if the main parachute fails.

components.name: Radio Telemetry Pack
components.desc: Sends live altitude and speed to the ground.

components.name: Onboard Camera Pod
components.desc: Films the flight from the rocket's point of view.

components.name: Payload Bay
components.desc: Extra space to carry an experiment or small satellite.

components.name: Launch Rail Guide
components.desc: Keeps the rocket straight on the launch rail.

components.name: Ablative Heat Shield
components.desc: Protects the rocket from re-entry heat.

components.name: Reaction Control Thrusters
components.desc: Small thrusters used to rotate the rocket in space.

components.name: Deployable Solar Panel
components.desc: Generates power for a satellite payload.

components.name: GPS Tracking Beacon
components.desc: Helps recovery teams find the rocket after landing.
